scripts.test:unit: pnpm test && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/gameplay test && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/room-domain test && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/contracts test && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/game-service test && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/web test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/gameplay typecheck && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/room-domain build && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/room-domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/contracts build && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/game-service typecheck && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/web typecheck
scripts.lint: biome check apps packages infra biome.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml test/production-foundation-*.test.mjs
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/gameplay build && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/room-domain build && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/contracts build && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/game-service build && pnpm --filter @three-zero-four/web build
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:unit
scripts.security:check:all: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm audit --audit-level=high && pnpm audit signatures
